title: Modified Qiagen Gel Extraction with MinElute Spin Column
author: Daniel J. Richter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ivdce26

steps.title: Add 3 volumes of Buffer QG to gel slice (e
steps.instruction: Add 3 volumes of Buffer QG to gel slice (e.g. 300 μL per 0.1 g of gel.)

steps.title: Incubate at 50º C for 10...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 50º C for 10 minutes, or until gel slice is dissolved. Mix every 2-3 minutes. 00:10:00, Incubation 00:03:00, Mix

steps.title: Add 1 gel volume of isopropanol and mix by inverting
steps.instruction: Add 1 gel volume of isopropanol and mix by inverting.

steps.title: Place 800 μL of sample in...
steps.instruction: Place 800 μL of sample in a QIAquick column within a collection tube, spin at maximum speed for 1 minute. undetermined, Sample 00:01:00, Maximum speed

steps.title: If any sample remains, continue spinning...
steps.instruction: If any sample remains, continue spinning through column and discard flow-through.

steps.title: Add 500 μL of buffer QG,...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of buffer QG, spin for 1 minute, and discard flow-through. undetermined, Buffer QG 00:01:00, Spin in centrifuge

steps.title: Wash with 750 μL of buffer...
steps.instruction: Wash with 750 μL of buffer PE, let stand 2-5 minutes, spin for 1 minute, discard flow through. undetermined, Buffer PE 00:05:00, Let stand 2-5 minutes 00:01:00, Spin in centrifuge.

steps.title: Clean top edge and bottom edge...
steps.instruction: Clean top edge and bottom edge of collection tube by pipetting out remaining liquid with P20. Modified from original kit protocol.

steps.title: Place column with hinge facing INWARDS...
steps.instruction: Place column with hinge facing INWARDS and spin for 1 minute at maximum speed. 00:01:00, At maximum speed Modified from original kit protocol.

steps.title: Place column with hinge facing OUTWARDS...
steps.instruction: Place column with hinge facing OUTWARDS and spin for 1 minute at maximum speed. 00:01:00, At maximum speed Modified from original kit protocol.

steps.title: Place column in new 1
steps.instruction: Place column in new 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Add 10
steps.instruction: Add 10.3 μL of water. undetermined, Water

steps.title: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute to elute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute to elute. 00:01:00, Centrifuge at maximum speed.
